mission: Scan every bot and generate a per-bot capabilities library with the top 100 capabilities each bot needs to compete with the best apps in its category.
competition_rules: Every bot keeps its existing capability metadata first.
Every bot is filled to 100 capabilities with category-relevant app, API, sandbox, trust, and revenue capabilities.
Every capability must identify whether it is existing, category-required, or competition-required.
Every live outreach, money, production, personal-data, or external-account capability remains approval-gated.
Every bot capability library must be generated from repository metadata and reviewed by Codex final judge before public claims.
